g.text: This guide provides an overview of how to use
a TUI (Textual User Interface) application for
gojeera's interface is navigable using mouse and
The main view is inspired by the Jira Cloud web UI,
with a search panel on the left, work item details in
the middle, and work item fields panel on the right.
gojeera uses profiles for authentication. Each profile
stores Jira connection metadata while secrets are
stored in the operating system keyring.
: Jira site URL + email + API token
